# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud storage security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: S3 bucket for user-uploaded files and application backups with secure configuration

Parameters:
  ApplicationRoleName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the IAM role used by the application
    AllowedPattern: '[a-zA-Z0-9+=,.@\-_]+'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid IAM role name

  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Description: Suffix for the S3 bucket name (will be prefixed with account ID and region)
    AllowedPattern: '[a-z0-9\-]+'
    ConstraintDescription: Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

Resources:
  AppStorageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}'
      AccessControl: Private
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref BucketEncryptionKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
        LogFilePrefix: app-storage-logs/
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: UserUploadsAndBackups
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  BucketEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting the application storage bucket
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleUsage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${ApplicationRoleName}'
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext
              - kms:ReEncryptFrom
              - kms:ReEncryptTo
            Resource: '*'

  BucketEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${BucketNameSuffix}-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref BucketEncryptionKey

  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}-access-logs'
      AccessControl: LogDeliveryWrite
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DeleteOldAccessLogs
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: AccessLogging
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  AccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AccessLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: S3ServerAccessLogsPolicy
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/app-storage-logs/*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  AppStorageBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AppStorageBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyIncorrectEncryptionHeader
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: 'aws:kms'
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedObjectUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              'Null':
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: 'true'
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${ApplicationRoleName}'
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
              - s3:GetObjectVersion
              - s3:ListBucketVersions
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 storage bucket
    Value: !Ref AppStorageBucket

  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 storage bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn

  EncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS encryption key
    Value: !GetAtt BucketEncryptionKey.Arn

  AccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the access logs bucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
